# Welcome to fawp-index Discussions

This is the community space for **fawp-index** — the
Information-Control Exclusion Principle detector.

## Categories

### Show your FAWP detection
Found a real FAWP regime in the wild? Share it here.
Include the asset/domain, score, ODW range, and what you think caused it.
The best detections get added to the gallery in the README.

### Q&A
Questions about calibration, interpretation, or integration.

### Ideas
Feature requests and use-case proposals.

### Research
Discussion of the underlying theory, papers, and extensions.
